sourceMovie.title: Over the Top
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Over the Top (1987) stuck because it commits to its action premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Menahem Golan's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The action and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Logan
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Over the Top clicked for you, Logan (2017) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and drama, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Over the Top?
faq.answer: Try Logan, Rambo: Last Blood, Foxcatcher—each shares DNA with Over the Top while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Over the Top?
faq.answer: Over the Top (1987) is best described as Action, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Over the Top worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.5/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
